name: av-panel-template
description: Crestron CH5 touch panel visual component library — React + Vite + TypeScript

scripts.package: npm run build && ch5-cli archive -p av-panel-template -d dist -o release

notes.ch5: @crestron/ch5-crcomlib is called directly in component callbacks (see README Step 5) — CH5's native web components (<ch5-button> etc.) are intentionally not used, since they would conflict with the LayoutCanvas drag-and-drop editor. ch5-webxpanel is only needed if testing via a browser-hosted Web XPanel against a control processor; the standard deploy path is `npm run package` → upload the .ch5z to the touch panel directly.
